CL-A8D161.title: Missing meta descriptions for key pages
CL-A8D161.description: Key pages on the website are missing meta descriptions, which can impact the website's search engine visibility.
CL-A8D161.remediation: Add unique and compelling meta descriptions to key pages for better search engine optimization.

CL-B5D79D.title: Unoptimized Meta Tags
CL-B5D79D.description: Meta tags such as meta titles and descriptions are unoptimized, impacting the website's search engine visibility and click-through rates.
CL-B5D79D.remediation: Optimize meta tags with relevant keywords and compelling descriptions to improve search engine rankings and attract more clicks.

CL-A0EC8C.title: Missing meta descriptions
CL-A0EC8C.description: Pages on the website do not have meta descriptions, which can impact search engine visibility and click-through rates.
CL-A0EC8C.remediation: Add unique and relevant meta descriptions to each page to improve SEO performance.

CL-80BCEF.title: Missing Meta Tags
CL-80BCEF.description: The website is missing important meta tags such as meta descriptions and title tags.
CL-80BCEF.remediation: Add relevant meta tags to improve search engine visibility and user engagement.
